title: Research Officer, NGS
description:
MiRXES is a Singapore-headquartered molecular diagnostic company with R&D, manufacturing, and clinical lab operations in Singapore, USA, Japan, and China. We specialize in microRNA technologies and the development, manufacturing, and provision of diagnostic test kits and clinical services. Our mission is to enable early disease detection and provide insights for better patient care by harnessing the power of microRNA to augment traditional testing. Our vision is to be the world’s leading developer and provider of accurate, actionable, and affordable microRNA-powered diagnostic tests.


Job Location: Neuros


Job Summary

The clinical lab is looking for a Research Officer, Genomics to to support end-to-end STOmics (SpatialTranscriptomics) wet-lab workflows. The role focuses on executing standardized laboratory procedures with a strong emphasis on workflow compliance, sample quality control, documentation accuracy, and teamwork. This position is suitable for candidates with basic molecular biology or NGS experience who are willing to learn, follow structured training, and work within established laboratory systems.


Roles and Responsibilities

  • Receive structured training on end-to-end STOmics workflows, including tissue processing, library preparation, and sequencing-related procedures
  • Perform hands-on laboratory operations related to STOmics workflows, including but not limited to:

o   Sample quality control (QC)

o   Tissue sectioning (fresh frozen and FFPE, training provided)

o   STOmics kit handling and workflow execution

o   Tissue staining

o   NGS library preparation and PCR-based library amplification

o   Sequencing workflows under guidance

  • Be responsible for accurate data entry, update, and maintenance of laboratory documentation, including sample records, QC records, and tracking logs
  • Support Senior staff in workflow optimization experiments and troubleshooting activities, including pre-test, validation, and process improvement tasks
  • Complete experimental records in a timely and accurate manner, and actively learn, follow, and support the rollout and updates of laboratory protocols and SOPs.
  • Demonstrate effective teamwork, collaborate closely with team members, and adapt to task or workflow adjustments based on project and operational needs
  • Participate in regular weekly reporting, including work progress updates, QC status, documentation updates, and timely issue escalation when required
  • Accept flexible work arrangements when required, including overtime (OT) support to meet project timelines and operational needs


Desired Skills & Competencies

  • Degree in Life Sciences or a related field with NGS working experience
  • Hands-on experience with STOmics (Spatial Transcriptomics) workflows is highly preferred
  • Experience in NGS wet-lab techniques, including NGS library preparation and PCR-based library amplification, is desirable
  • Experience in tissue handling and sectioning, with fresh frozen (FF) and/or FFPE samples considered an advantage (even limited exposure is acceptable)
  • Demonstrates strong sense of responsibility, attention to detail, and commitment to sample quality and accurate documentation
  • Familiar with laboratory practices, SOP-driven workflows, and basic experimental documentation
  • Shows strong learning ability, good communication skills, and self-motivation, with the ability to work effectively in a team and support flexible work arrangements when required


This position is based in Singapore.

We appreciate your interest in the above-mentioned position, however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Be part of the team delivering world-leading multi-cancer early detection. MiRXES is a Singapore-headquartered biotechnology company that translates research discoveries to deliver world-leading multi-cancer early detection. We are Asia-centered, starting with Southeast Asia, and have global ambitions. We have research, development, manufacturing, and clinical diagnostic operations in Singapore, USA, Japan, and China.


Our versatile platform technology and capabilities have broad applications in the discovery of biomarkers and diagnosis of diseases. We started with cancer, but are also addressing unmet clinical needs in cardiovascular, metabolic, and infectious diseases.
postedCompany.name: MIRXES LAB PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
